title: Sha`aph #8174
definition:
Shaaph = "division"

 1) son of Jahdai of the family of Caleb, the brother of Jerahmeel
 2) son of Caleb, the brother of Jerahmeel, by his concubine Maachah
    and father of Madmannah
nasbUsage:
